overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a student in wizard robes walking through a medieval castle courtyard during golden hour. The character navigates around a central fountain, passes other students, and approaches a massive Gothic entrance with winged statues.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle courtyard with central fountain and seating areas

agents.ego_description: walking steadily around the fountain courtyard, passing students seated on stone benches

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes sitting on a stone bench reading a book

entered.detail: large circular multi-tiered fountain with water lilies floating in the basin
massive stone castle building with tall Gothic windows and intricate masonry
stone seating arranged along the courtyard perimeter
large decorative planters with greenery and flowers
distant mountain peaks visible behind the castle towers

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sunlit castle courtyard with a large tiered fountain at the center. The character walks along an irregular stone path, curving around the fountain while passing students seated on benches. The massive Gothic castle facade dominates the background with warm golden hour lighting casting long shadows across the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition path between courtyard and main entrance

events.description: moving from the open fountain courtyard into a narrower hedge-lined approach path

agents.ego_description: passing through a group of students gathered near the fountain edge, continuing toward the castle entrance

notable_agents.action: student in yellow robes standing and conversing with a group near the fountain
student in green robes with white trim walking past the camera toward the fountain

entered.detail: tall neatly trimmed hedges lining both sides of the path
large stone containers with white flowering plants

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the open courtyard into a more enclosed path lined with tall hedges. Several students in colored robes are gathered near the fountain edge, with one student in green walking past the camera. The fountain and benches fall behind as the path becomes more formal and directed toward the castle entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: formal entrance approach with flanking statues

events.description: beginning to ascend the slight incline toward the main entrance steps

agents.ego_description: walking down the straight cobblestone path toward the castle's main entrance, approaching the large wooden doors

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking away from the entrance toward the courtyard

entered.detail: large ornate wooden door with metal studs and an arched stone frame
stone statues of winged creatures flanking the entrance staircase
ornate lamp posts mounted on stone pillars along the path
regular cobblestone paving leading directly to the entrance

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach to the castle's main entrance along a straight cobblestone path. The massive wooden door dominates the view, flanked by impressive winged stone statues on pedestals. The character passes a student walking in the opposite direction as they ascend the slight incline toward the entrance steps, with the Gothic architecture looming larger in the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit castle courtyard that gradually narrows into a formal approach toward a massive Gothic entrance. It begins by curving along an irregular stone path around a large tiered fountain, passing students on benches under the warm glow of golden hour. As the character moves forward, the open courtyard shifts into a more enclosed path lined with tall hedges, leaving the fountain and benches behind while students in colored robes drift past. The scene then opens onto a straight cobblestone walkway that leads directly toward the castle's main entrance, where the architecture looms larger in the frame. Finally, the camera ascends a slight incline past winged stone statues on pedestals, heading straight for the towering wooden doors.
